title: QueueItem (harness-adjacent)
description: The drive-loop's disposition-queue item AND the resume_state persistence shape. This is a HARNESS-ADJACENT type, NOT the locked rebuild/schemas queueItem: that one is .strict() with exactly {id, kind, exit} and would REJECT the summary/classification/proposed/evidence fields the harness needs. The kind + exit vocabularies are reused from the locked contract (3-kind × 3-exit completeness), but the surrounding envelope is the harness's own. Keep the kind/exit enums in sync with rebuild/schemas/queue-item.ts.

exit.description: Mirrors rebuild/schemas queueExit (+ null = still open). An item leaves the queue only through one of the three doors.

classification.description: current-scope blocks completion; new-scope is backlog/carve (needs Codex concurrence); blocking is escape.

proposed.description: A carve proposal awaiting Codex adjudication.

evidence.description: Evidence refs attached on resolution (mirrors slice-observation.evidence items).
